title: ACTI Incident Enrichment
content:
This playbook enriches Intelligence Alerts, Intelligence Reports, Malware Families, Threat Actors, Threat Groups & Threat Campaigns

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Accenture pack (AccentureCTI, partner-supported).

Inputs — ia_uuid; ir_uuid; MalwareFamily_uuid; ThreatGroup_uuid; ThreatCampaign_uuid; ThreatActor_uuid.

Integrations/scripts used: ACTI Indicator Query.
raw_yaml:
